## Summary

Describe the bounded change and the collection, policy, or tool it affects.

## Evidence

List source URLs, editions, page locations, manifests, or issue links supporting the change.

## Rights And Provenance

- [ ] Third-party material includes source and rights evidence.
- [ ] No controlled, encrypted, or access-bypassed material is included.
- [ ] Corpus text, scans, translations, and content-bearing metadata follow the repository rights gate.
- [ ] No secrets, cookies, credentials, or private personal information are included.

## Validation

- [ ] I ran the relevant checks from `AGENTS.md`.
- [ ] Generated collection status and GBrain paths remain synchronized.
- [ ] The change does not present unreviewed OCR or AI output as authorial text.
- [ ] Documentation links and metadata remain valid.
